title: Set up TanStack Query (React Query) for server state management
summary: Install @tanstack/react-query, configure QueryClient and QueryClientProvider, implement useQuery and useMutation, and integrate with Next.js App Router.
declaration: I will set up TanStack Query v5 (@tanstack/react-query) for server state management. This handles data fetching, caching, background refetching, and mutations. I will configure QueryClientProvider in a client wrapper, implement typed query hooks, and follow Next.js App Router best practices. If you are using Pages Router, say so before I begin.
